subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Mutlaq - 'Mutlaq' signifieth 'free'! Praise be to God, thou art free and prosperous, and day by day thy love for God doth increase [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب مطلق مطلق یعنی آزاد الحمد لله آزادی و آبادی و روز بروز در محبت الله در ازدیادی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
